chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7652 of 2019 CP D 5508 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition 19.12.2024 Mr. Inzimam Sharif, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ameer Bux Metlo, advocate for respondent Mr. Mukesh Kumar, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General It is jointly stated that the petitioner shall respond to the show cause notices before the concerned forum and the department shall adjudicate the same after providing an opportunity of hearing to the petitioners and determine the same vide a speaking orders. Furthermore, the department shall not take any further coercive action against the petitioners pending the aforesaid adjudication. Order accordingly. Petitions are disposed of. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
